function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: "2026-03-31T16:32:00Z"
send_state: draft
to:
  - "nina@finance-workflow.example"
subject: "Resend: INV-0002 (2025-12-02)"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-02 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH) as an attachment.

Best,
Miles

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a draft resend email to Nina with the requested invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender against entity primary_contact_email, wrote outbound email record using sending-email workflow format, then deleted completed inbox item per inbox rules.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical inbox header requested resend of the 2025-12-02 Nordstern invoice; sender from-address matched Nina's primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md; requested invoice was located and read at 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_02__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md; outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox with that exact attachment path; no security-denial criteria were triggered.
